meta.title: Nodika
meta.description: View Nodika project status and upload snapshots.

auth.genericError: We could not complete your request.
auth.unreachable: The authentication service could not be reached. Try again later.

forgotPassword.heading: Reset your password
forgotPassword.success: If the account exists, you will receive email instructions.

resetPassword.heading: Choose a new password
resetPassword.success: Your password was updated. You can sign in now.

verifyEmail.heading: Verify your email
verifyEmail.success: Your email is verified. You can sign in now.

upload.title: Upload a project snapshot
upload.description: Paste snapshot JSON, check syntax, then send it to Nodika Core. A successful upload also refreshes the home project dashboard.
upload.editorHelp: The editor checks JSON syntax before upload. After a successful upload, the home dashboard updates from this snapshot.
upload.signInPrompt: Sign in to upload a snapshot. Your session is managed securely by Nodika and no token needs to be pasted here.
upload.correctSyntax: Correct the JSON syntax errors before uploading.
upload.uploadFailed: The snapshot could not be uploaded.
upload.unexpectedResponse: Core returned an unexpected upload response.
upload.unreachable: The upload service could not be reached. Try again later.

dashboard.emptyDescription: Upload a Nodika snapshot JSON from the avatar menu to see progress, duration mix, and task grids on this home page.
dashboard.noObjectiveTasks: No objective tasks in this snapshot.
dashboard.noContextTasks: No context tasks in this snapshot.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage appearance, language, timezone, and password.
settings.loadError: We could not load your settings.
settings.unreachable: The settings service could not be reached. Try again later.
settings.appearanceDescription: Choose how Nodika looks on this device.
settings.timezoneDescription: Choose the timezone used for follow-up emails and upcoming send previews.
settings.passwordDescription: Update your password without leaving the app.
settings.passwordMismatch: Confirmation does not match the new password.
settings.passwordError: We could not update your password.
settings.emailDescription: Pick the days and time: assigned Team messages are re-sent over WhatsApp, and you get an email summary.
settings.noUpcomingSends: No upcoming sends with this configuration.
settings.saveError: We could not save your settings.

staff.title: Staff and WhatsApp
staff.description: Track area leads: outbound sends, replies, and reminders in one grid.
staff.loadError: We could not load staff messaging.
staff.unreachable: The messaging service could not be reached.
staff.rosterDescription: Add or remove employees as the project progresses. Sort and filter the grid; send tests or reminders per row.
staff.contactsDescription: Save each lead’s WhatsApp number so nodika can contact them.
staff.contactSaveError: We could not save the contact.
staff.removeError: We could not remove the employee.
staff.templateHelp: Use double-brace interpolation. The backend replaces each token when sending.
staff.widgetsHelp: Buttons, checkboxes, and inputs can be modeled in the template, but WhatsApp (Baileys) won’t render native controls: they’re flattened into plain text reply instructions (e.g. “Reply A for Yes”).
staff.templateSaveError: We could not save the template.
staff.testDescription: Send the current message to a contact to verify WhatsApp delivery.
staff.testError: We could not send the test.
staff.testNoContact: Choose a contact for the test.
staff.remindError: We could not send the reminder.
staff.catalogDescription: Define messages, assign them to an employee, and they send automatically over WhatsApp. Track reply latency; full text is stored for later analysis.
staff.catalogSavedAndSent: Message saved and sent to the employee.
staff.catalogSaveError: We could not save the message.
staff.catalogLoadError: We could not load the message catalog.
staff.catalogAssignError: We could not assign the message.
staff.catalogSendError: We could not send the message.
staff.catalogDeleteError: We could not delete the message.
